relationships: ber:Tom yerzef ɣer Ustṛalya akken ad iẓer kra seg yiqriben-is
ber:Yella ccek d ameqqran dakken Tom ad yili mazal-it deg Ustṛalya
ber:Ad iliɣ deg Ustṛalya tagara n yimalas d-itteddun
ber:Aseggas ay d-yetteddun, ad mahleɣ deg Ustṛalya
ber:Tom ur yelli ara deg Ustṛalya aseggas iεeddan﹖
ber:Tom yella deg Ustṛalya aseggas iεeddan﹖
ber:Llant aṭas n tɣawsiwin ara yexdem yiwen deg Ustṛalya
ber:Tom yella deg Ustṛalya aseggas iεeddan
ber:Iyyat ad nṛuḥ ɣer Ustṛalya imalas i d-itteddun
ber:Kraḍ n yiseggasen aya seg wasmi i zedɣeɣ deg Ustṛalya
ber:Lliɣ ẓriɣ dakken Tom mačči deg Ustṛalya i yella
ber:Ulac tamurt niḍen ideg ddreɣ menɣir Ustṛalya
ber:Ad ṛuḥeɣ ɣer Ustṛalya imalas d-itteddun
ber:Rezfeɣ yakan acḥal n tikkal ɣer Ustṛalya
ber:Baba iṛuḥ snat n tikkal ɣer Ustṛalya
ber:Tom yerzef acḥal n tikkal ɣer Ustṛalya
ber:Mary tenna-d dakken ad tṛuḥ ɣer Ustṛalya s usafag
ber:Tenna-d Mary dakken tṛuḥ yakan ɣer Ustṛalya
